summary: A Go-based CLI tool called SmokeSig that executes assertion-based validation runs and exposes MCP handlers, heavily supplemented by agent-generated extra tests.
concerns: high volume of agent-generated extra tests suggests potential flakiness or coverage gaps
recent commit fixing a missed import path indicates possible post-refactor fragility
scattered test directories across GOrchestra/glm-agents/* imply complex external CI/generation pipeline
staged and untracked files in git status suggest incomplete commit hygiene
suggestions: consolidate or clean up the numerous agent-generated extra test directories
verify test stability and remove redundant extra tests post-refactor
ensure all import paths are updated following the SmokeSig rename
commit or stash the pending staged/untracked changes to maintain a clean working tree
